prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `f83cb3f6`.
codex_response:
Implemented `f83cb3f6` end to end. The verifier treats the `8` cells as a single horizontal or vertical axis and collapses any same-color foreground cells onto the immediately adjacent cells on the matching side, only for rows or columns where an `8` is actually present. `arc2.shared.verify` passed `4/4` official examples, and `arc2.shared.build --n-examples 1000` completed successfully.

I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint as the starting point and discarded the conflicting `sonnet45` hint; that mismatch is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_f83cb3f6/notes.md). No new shared primitive was needed. The generator produces both orientations, mixes full and broken axes, keeps the sparse singleton-noise profile, and I sanity-checked the outputs via generated JSONs plus an in-terminal render of `preview_01.png`.
